Job description

As a Backend Engineering Intern at Perpendo AI, you will build the core API services, data pipelines, and integration layers that power our insurance platform. This role is ideal for students who love distributed systems, clean API design, and the challenge of making complex data workflows reliable at scale.

Key Responsibilities

Design and implement FastAPI endpoints supporting multi-track service delivery
Build and maintain PostgreSQL schemas, Redis caching layers, and asynchronous task queues
Integrate third-party APIs, SQL data services
Implement TraceID-based audit logging and data lineage tracking across platform services
Write comprehensive unit and integration tests; maintain >80% code coverage targets
Participate in architecture reviews and contribute to technical documentation

Required Qualifications

Pursuing BS/MS in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or related field 
Proficiency in Python; experience with FastAPI or Flask for REST API development
Working knowledge of SQL databases (PostgreSQL preferred) and ORM frameworks (SQLAlchemy)
Understanding of HTTP, JSON APIs, authentication patterns (JWT/OAuth)
Comfortable with Git version control and collaborative development workflows

Preferred / Bonus Skills

Experience with Docker and containerized development environments
Exposure to message queues (Celery, Redis, RabbitMQ) or event-driven architectures
Basic knowledge of AWS services (S3, RDS, Lambda)
Familiarity with insurance or financial services data
